text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Da-dun-daaah!♪ Da-dun! Da-dun! 
Dun-dah, dun-dadaaah… Boom!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
…Come on! This is where you call my name! 
El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You know, like a pro wrestler's entrance! 
Come on, Trainer, do it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I bet if we did it before a race, the crowd 
would get super hyped! Right? Right? 
Come on, let's do iiit!
